origin.abstract: Manage origin environment takeover (status / takeover / release)
origin.hint: Run 'orrery origin release' or 'orrery uninstall' to restore at any time.
origin.releaseAbstract: Restore origin tool configs to their system locations
origin.statusAbstract: Show which tools are managed by Orrery
origin.takeoverAbstract: Move origin tool configs into Orrery storage
uninstall.abstract: Remove Orrery shell integration and restore managed configs
uninstall.confirmPrompt: Remove Orrery shell integration and restore all managed configs? [y/N]
uninstall.done: Orrery uninstalled. Restart your terminal to complete.
create.alreadyExists: Environment '{name}' already exists. Use a different name or 'orrery delete {name}' first.
create.askInstallStatusline: Install Claude Code statusline? (↑↓ move, enter confirm)
create.askSetupTool: Add and set up {tool}? (↑↓ move, enter confirm)
create.cloneHelp: Clone tools and env vars from an existing environment
create.clonePrompt: Clone config from an existing environment? (plugins/skills/settings — login state handled in previous step; ↑↓ move, enter confirm):
create.clonePromptFor: {tool} — clone config from an existing environment? (plugins/skills/settings — login handled above; ↑↓ move, enter confirm):
create.cloned: Cloned tools and env vars from: {source}
create.copyLoginFailed: Could not copy login state from {source} (source not logged in)
create.copyLoginHelp: Copy login state from an existing environment
create.copyLoginPrompt: Copy login state (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
create.copyLoginPromptFor: {tool} — copy login state (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
create.firstEnvCreated:
First environment created — activating '{name}' automatically.
Run 'orrery use {name}' to apply it to this shell.
create.isolateMemoryHelp: Isolate memory for this environment instead of sharing it (default: shared)
create.isolateSessionsHelp: Isolate sessions per environment instead of sharing them across environments (default: shared)
create.memoryShareNo: Isolate memory (this environment has its own memory)
create.memoryShareYes: Share memory (all environments use the same memory)
create.noToolSelected: No tool selected — use 'orrery tools add <env>' to add one later.
create.unknownTool: Unknown tool '{raw}'. Valid tools: claude, codex, gemini
create.wizardTitle: Select a tool (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
current.abstract: Print the name of the active environment
delegate.abstract: Delegate a task to an AI tool in a specific environment
delegate.noManagedSessions: No managed sessions found. Create one with --session-name <name> first.
delegate.noPromptNoResume: Provide a prompt, or use --resume / --session to continue an existing session.
delegate.resumeHelp: Resume a session by index, ID, or 'last'
delegate.resumeNotFound: No matching session found. Run orrery sessions to see the list.
delegate.sessionNameHelp: Create or continue a named session
delegate.sessionPickerRequiresTTY: Interactive session picker requires a terminal. Use --session-name <name> instead.
delete.confirm: Delete environment '{name}'? This cannot be undone. [y/N]
delete.confirmBatch: Delete these {count} environment(s)? This cannot be undone. [y/N]
delete.multiSelectTitle: Select environments to delete (↑↓ move, space toggle, enter confirm):
delete.reservedName: 'origin' is a reserved environment and cannot be deleted.
envVar.abstract: Manage configuration values in an environment
envVar.defaultNotSupported: 'origin' is the system origin environment and does not support env var configuration.
envVar.noActive: No active environment. Run 'orrery use <name>' first, or use -e <name>.
envVar.setAbstract: Set configuration values in an environment
envVar.unsetAbstract: Remove configuration values from an environment
export.abstract: Internal: print export lines for a named environment (called by shell function)
info.abstract: Show details of an orrery environment
info.defaultInfo:
Name:        origin
Description: Your system origin environment. Switching to 'origin' exits Orrery — tools fall back to system-wide config, with no isolation or per-environment variables applied.
info.noActive: No active environment. Specify a name or run 'orrery use <name>' first.
init.abstract: Output shell integration script (add to shell rc: eval "$(orrery init)")
list.empty: No environments found. Create one with: orrery create <name>
magi.abstract: マルチモデルディスカッションを開始し、合意を形成する
magi.insufficientTools: ディスカッションには少なくとも2つのツールが必要です。
magi.outputHelp: Markdownレポートをファイルに出力
magi.roundsHelp: 最大ディスカッションラウンド数（デフォルト：3）
magi.runSaved: ディスカッション記録を保存しました: {path}
magi.toolStart: {tool} の応答を待っています...
magi.rolesHelp: ロールプリセットまたはカンマ区切りのロールID（例：balanced、verifier,pragmatist,strategist）
magi.resumeHelp: 前回の Magi run ID から再開
magi.noSummarizeHelp: FinalVerdict の要約をスキップし、コードマージのみ使用
magi.timeoutWarning: {tool} が {seconds} 秒後にタイムアウトしました
magi.sessionIdNotFound: {tool} のセッション ID を特定できませんでした
magi.topicHelp: ディスカッショントピック
mCPServerCmd.abstract: Start MCP server (for Claude Code integration)
mCPSetup.setupAbstract: Set up Orrery MCP server for the current project
mCPSetup.success: Orrery MCPサーバーとスラッシュコマンドがインストールされました。AIツールを再起動して /orrery:delegate、/orrery:sessions、/orrery:resume、/orrery:phantom、/orrery:magi、/orrery:spec、/orrery:spec-verify、/orrery:spec-implement、/orrery:spec-status を使用してください。
memory.alreadyIsolated: Memory is already isolated for this environment.
memory.alreadyShared: Memory is already shared for this environment.
memory.discardConfirm: ⚠️  Discard this memory? This cannot be undone. [y/N]
memory.exportAbstract: Export shared memory for the current project
memory.infoAbstract: Show current memory status and path
memory.isolateAbstract: Switch this environment to isolated memory
memory.migrationDiscardToIsolated: Start fresh (do not import shared memory)
memory.migrationDiscardToShared: Discard current memory (use shared memory only) ⚠️ irreversible
memory.migrationDone.isolated: Memory for '{envName}' switched to isolated mode.
memory.migrationDone.shared: Memory for '{envName}' switched to shared mode.
memory.migrationMergeToIsolated: Copy shared memory (use as starting point for isolated memory)
memory.migrationMergeToShared: Merge both (bring isolated memory into shared)
memory.migrationPrompt: How would you like to handle existing memory? (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
memory.noActiveEnv: No active environment. Run 'orrery use <name>' first, or use -e <name>.
memory.noMemory: No shared memory for this project.
memory.shareAbstract: Switch this environment to shared memory
memory.storageCopyPrompt: New path has no memory yet. Copy current memory there?
memory.storageNotDirectory: Path '{path}' exists but is not a directory.
memory.storagePathHelp: Storage path. Omit to show current setting; use --reset to restore default.
orrery.abstract: AI CLI environment manager — manage accounts for Claude, Codex, Gemini
rename.reservedName: 'origin' is a reserved environment and cannot be renamed.
resume.indexOutOfRange: Index {index} out of range ({count} sessions available).
resume.noIndex: Please specify a session index. Run orrery sessions to see the list.
resume.pickerTitle: セッションを選択（{count} 件）↑↓ 移動・Enter 確定・Esc／Ctrl+C キャンセル
run.abstract: Run a command in a specific environment
run.noCommand: No command specified. Example: orrery run -e work claude --resume <id>
spec.abstract: 議論レポートから構造化specを生成
spec.profileHelp: Specプロファイル：default、minimal、rfc、またはカスタムテンプレート名
spec.toolHelp: 生成に使用するAIツール（claude/codex/gemini）
spec.reviewHelp: 品質向上のためデュアルモデルレビューを有効化
spec.inputNotFound: 入力ファイルが見つかりません：{path}
spec.profileNotFound: Specプロファイルが見つかりません：{name}。利用可能：default、minimal、rfc
spec.noToolAvailable: 利用可能なAIツールがありません。claude、codex、またはgeminiをインストールしてください。
specRun.specPathHelp: Spec markdownファイルのパス（CWDからの相対または絶対）
specRun.resumeHelp: 再開するsession ID（verifyモードでは無視されます）
specRun.timeoutHelp: 全受入コマンドの合計秒数上限（デフォルト600）
specRun.perCommandTimeoutHelp: コマンド毎のSIGTERMまでの秒数（デフォルト60）
specRun.executeHelp: dry-runを無効化し、sandbox内でshellコマンドを実際に実行
specRun.strictPolicyHelp: policy_blockedとなった任意のコマンドを失敗として扱う（exit code非ゼロ）
specRun.reviewHelp: verify完了後にMagi advisory reviewを起動
specRun.specNotFound: Specファイルが見つかりません：{path}
specRun.invalidMode: 無効なmode：{mode}。plan|implement|verify|runのいずれかを指定してください
specRun.missingAcceptanceSection: Specに「## 驗收標準」セクションがありません
specRun.missingInterfaceContractSection: Specに「## 介面合約」セクションがありません — specを補完するか先にorrery_spec_planを実行してください
specRun.missingChangedFilesSection: Specに「## 改動檔案」セクションがありません — specを補完するか先にorrery_spec_planを実行してください
specRun.missingImplementationStepsSectio: Specに「## 實作步驟」セクションがありません — specを補完するか先にorrery_spec_planを実行してください
specRun.sessionNotFound: spec-runセッションが見つかりません：{id}
specRun.delegateLaunchFailed: Delegateサブプロセスのリトライ後も起動に失敗：{stderr}
specRun.finalizeAbstract: 内部コマンド：wrapper shell 終了後に spec-run implement session を確定（wrapper から呼び出される、ユーザーは直接呼び出さない）
specRun.sessionIdHelp: 以前 orrery_spec_implement が返した session ID（UUID）— --mode status で必須
specRun.watchHelp: --mode implement で delegate subprocess の終了までブロック（debug / CI 用）；デフォルトは detached early-return
specRun.includeLogHelp: --mode status で progress jsonl の末尾を log_tail に含める；デフォルト false
specRun.sinceTimestampHelp: --mode status で ts がこの ISO8601 タイムスタンプより後の log エントリのみ返す
specRun.unknownTool: 未知のツール：{tool}。claude|codex|geminiを指定してください
specRun.modeNotImplemented: Mode「{mode}」は本releaseでは未実装です。現在はverifyのみ利用可能。
specRun.verifyFreshSession: verifyフェーズは新規sessionを使用し、resume_session_id={id}は無視されました
specRun.policyBlockedSummary: {count}件のコマンドがpolicy_blockedされました。--strict-policyで失敗扱いにできます
sessions.abstract: List AI tool sessions for the current project
sessions.noSessions: No sessions found for this project.
setup.abstract: Install orrery shell integration (use: eval "$(orrery setup)")
setup.alreadyPresent: orrery: shell integration already present in {path}
setup.migratedRc: orrery: migrated {path} from eval to source
setup.shellHelp: Shell type to configure (bash, zsh). Auto-detected if omitted.
tools.addAbstract: Add a tool to the environment
tools.addWizardTitle: Select a tool to add to '{envName}' (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
tools.defaultNotSupported: 'origin' is the system origin environment and does not support tool configuration. Run 'orrery create <name>' to create an environment.
tools.noActive: No active environment. Run 'orrery use <name>' first, or use -e <name>.
tools.noToolsToAdd: '{envName}' already has all supported tools — nothing to add.
tools.removeAbstract: Remove a tool from the environment
tools.removeWizardTitle: Select a tool to remove from '{envName}' (↑↓ move, enter confirm):
unexport.abstract: Internal: print unset lines for a named environment (called by shell function)
update.abstract: Update orrery to the latest version
update.notice: orrery: update available {current} → v{latest}  run: orrery update
use.abstract: Activate an environment in the current shell
use.needsShellIntegration:
error: 'orrery use' requires shell integration.
Run 'orrery setup' to install it, then restart your terminal.
which.abstract: Print the config directory path for a tool in the active environment
which.noActive: No active environment. Run 'orrery use <name>' first.
which.toolHelp: Tool name: claude, codex, or gemini
which.unknownTool: Unknown tool '{tool}'. Valid tools: claude, codex, gemini
install.abstract: Install a third-party add-on into an environment
install.urlHelp: Override the manifest source URL (use a custom git repository)
install.refHelp: Override the manifest source ref (git branch/tag/sha)
install.forceRefreshHelp: Re-clone the source even if the cached copy already exists
install.success: Installed {id} ({shortRef}) into env '{env}'. {fileCount} files copied, settings patched.
thirdparty.abstract: Manage installed third-party add-ons for an environment
thirdparty.uninstallAbstract: Remove a third-party add-on from an environment
thirdparty.listAbstract: List installed third-party add-ons for an environment
thirdparty.availableAbstract: List third-party add-ons shipped with orrery
phantom.triggerAbstract: Internal: signal phantom-supervised claude to relaunch under a different env (called by /orrery:phantom)
phantom.notUnderPhantom: Not running under phantom supervision. Launch claude with 'orrery run claude' (phantom is on by default) to enable in-place env switching.
phantom.claudeNotFound: Could not find a running claude process under the phantom supervisor.
phantom.signalFailed: Failed to signal claude to exit. The relaunch was aborted.
phantom.switchingNoSession: Switching to '{env}' (no session to resume — fresh conversation)…
